name: sdm
description: Semantic Data Model — classes, instances, typed relations, ISA-95 asset hierarchy, graph canvas, mass engineering (templates / Excel-CSV / validation) and WinCC OA project migration.

nextSteps.title: Semantic Data Model — SDM backend required
steps: This package delivers the WebUI page only. The page talks to the SDM backend over the WebUI WebSocket (the sdm.* command family).
Make sure the SDM backend manager is running in this project:
It is the webserver.js customization (sdm/run.js) that registers the sdm.* commands;
see the @martinkumhera SDM backend package / the sdm project README.
Reload the WebUI (hard reload; close all tabs once so the ServiceWorker/SharedWorker pick up the new page).
footer: Without the SDM backend the page loads but every sdm.* call fails.
On first open the backend bootstraps its meta data point types automatically — no DPL import needed.
